expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: SDK/API visible outcomes like window title become explicit scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly includes SDK/API-visible outcome scenarios, e.g. “Create blank report shows correct window title (SDK/API-visible outcome)” with checks like “Verify the window title is not the raw key `newReportWithApplication`” and “Verify the window title contains Report A…”. execution_notes.md also states “SDK/API-visible outcomes are explicit scenario leaves, especially window title correctness/localization and ‘single loading indicator’.”

expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md asserts Phase 4a alignment: “Structure: central topic → subcategory-first bullets… Steps: atomic nested action chains with observable verification leaves.” result.md matches this with a “Central topic” header and subcategory-first bullets containing nested step chains ending in “Verify …” leaves, consistent with Phase 4a contract style.
